title: Trilegal and Khaitan & Co lead on Aman Gupta’s ₹100 Crore Seed Round for OFF/BEAT
description: OffBeat Studios Private Limited, dba OFF/BEAT, has concluded a Series Seed funding round led by Bessemer Venture Partners (BVP) and Reed India.Trilegal advised OFF/BEAT and its founder, Aman Gupta (co-founder of boAt), on this fundraise. The transaction involved a cross-border investment into an Indian company, with participation from a Mauritius-based investor as well as an India-based employee benefit trust.The transaction team was led by Amit Khansaheb (Partner) and Vishruta Kaul (Partne
